Defined in: [src/app/testing/factory/coffee.factory.ts:63](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/3d2831b148eaa4c84c57fa062fce6df920f72a50/src/app/testing/factory/coffee.factory.ts#L63)

Default list of [Coffee](../../../../service/coffee/types/type-aliases/Coffee.md) fixtures used by mock repositories.

## Deprecated

No longer imported by any test.  The Effect-TS
migration uses `InMemoryCoffeeRepository` with its own
built-in seed data.  Use individual fixtures
([flatWhiteCoffee](flatWhiteCoffee.md), [espressoCoffee](espressoCoffee.md)) when specific
entities are needed.

## Remarks

Contains [flatWhiteCoffee](flatWhiteCoffee.md) and [espressoCoffee](espressoCoffee.md) in
insertion order.
